_comment: Declarative QA rules for Silver parquet datasets. The ingestion script merges the default block with the dataset-specific block matching the parquet stem.

default._comment: Baseline checks shared by all datasets: structural presence of the business grain and generic validation on year/key columns.

datasets._comment: Each dataset can tighten the default checks, typically by requiring its metric column and validating that metric as numeric.

countries._comment: The reference scaffold must be complete because every downstream join depends on it.

gdp_per_capita_usd._comment: Adds the GDP-per-capita metric column to the expected schema and validates it as numeric.

gdp_per_capita_ppp._comment: Ensures PPP GDP per capita is present and numeric after the Silver rename step.

gdp_ppp_world_share._comment: Validates the world GDP share measure used later in the analytical OBT.

unemployment_rate._comment: The unemployment series must preserve the shared business grain plus its renamed metric column.

public_debt_gdp._comment: Debt-to-GDP is checked as a numeric measure before being loaded into Gold.

inflation_avg_consumer._comment: Inflation keeps the standard grain and adds its dedicated metric column after rename.
